arts.ttl: Barca will be tested with emotions running high against Benfica
arts.sum: If there is any silver lining in this difficult moment, it’s that Hansi Flick’s team has truly been a band of brothers from the beginning, navigating a very challenging season, and finding a way to carve a path forward in spite of the deck that has been stacked against them. Adding to the challenge of managing player emotions will be the response of the team to the shocking passing of team doctor, Carles Miñarro Garcia, over the weekend .
